title: SMART BOOST
description:
SMART BOOST is a minimalist texture pack, which is inspired by Minecraft trailer graphics.
very minimal and smooth graphics with cool and beautiful looks.
SMART BOOST is a 16 pixel texture pack.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
SMART BOOST is a minimalist texture pack, which is inspired by minecraft trailer graphics.  
very minimal and smooth graphics with cool and beautiful looks.  
SMART BOOST is a 16 pixel texture pack.  
this pack provide assist in PvP fights,  
this pack provide very simple looks and less pressure to the game graphics.  
its a very low graphics texture pack. 
this pack is compatible with various shaders, with great potential.  
this pack optimized the minecarft graphics into smooth and adaptable graphics. 
with shaders this pack provide amazing looks.  
this texture pack provide deep dark black widgets[GUI]  
highly optimized and compatible with every version.  
this pack make your game smooth and stable for gameplay.  
it's based of minecraft simple and coloured graphics.  


THERE ARE MANY CHANGES IN THE GRAPHICS  
CHANGES ARE -  
1) all blocks  
2) all trees  
3) all woods  
4) all logs  
5) all leaves  
6) all doors  
7) all trpdoors

version supported  
form- 1.16 to latest  


compatible with both single world and servers.   

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack  
all versions have separate files  

 

enjoy the pack  
make your minecraft look like minecraft trailer.  

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADIND.
